     intro x hx
     have h₃ : xs.head! ≤ x := h₂ x hx
     have h₄ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
       have h₅ : ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x := by
         intro x hx

           have h₇ : x ∈ ys := hx
           have h₈ : ∀ y ∈ ys, y ≥ ys.head! := by
             intro y hy
             have h₉ : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ y := h y (List.mem_append_right xs hy)
             simp [h₁] at h₉ ⊢

             (try omega) <;>
             (try
               {
                 have h₁₀ : xs.head! ≤ y := by assumption
                 have h₁₁ : ys.head! ≤ y := by
                   have h₁₂ : y ≥ ys.head! := by
                     have h₁₃ : y ∈ ys := hy
                     have h₁₄ : ys.head! ≤ y := by
                       -- Use the fact that the head! of ys is less than or equal to any element in ys
                       -- This is true because the list is ordered and the head! is the smallest element
                       cases' ys with y' ys'
                       <;> simp_all [List.head!, List.mem_cons, List.mem_nil_iff]
                       <;> omega
                     exact h₁₄
                   omega
                 omega
               }) <;>
             (try omega)
           have h₁₀ : y ≥ ys.head! := h₈ x hx
           omega
         exact h₆
       have h₆ : x ∈ ys := hx
       have h₇ : ys.head! ≤ x := h₅ x h₆
       exact h₇
     omega
   | inr h₁ =>
     simp_all [h₁, List.head!_nil, List.mem_nil_iff]
     <;> tauto

         simp_all [List.head!, List.all_append_left, List.all_append_right]
         <;>
         (try omega)
     })
   })
   <;>
   (try {
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp_all [List.head!, List.all_append_left, List.all_append_right]
     | cons a as =>
       simp_all [List.head!, List.all_append_left, List.all_append_right]
       <;>
       (try omega)
   })
z)
sorry

have h₁ : ∀ x ∈ ys, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := by
     intro x hx
     have h₂ : x ∈ xs ++ ys := by
       apply List.mem_append_right
       exact hx
     have h₃ : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h x h₂
     exact h₃
   have h₂ : ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x := by
     intro x hx
     have h₃ : xs ++ ys ≠ [] := by
       by_contra h₄
       have h₅ : xs ++ ys = [] := by simpa using h₄
       have h₆ : xs = [] := by
         have h₇ : xs = [] := by
           simp [List.append_eq_nil] at h₅ ⊢
           <;> aesop
         exact h₇
       have h₇ : ys = [] := by
         have h₈ : ys = [] := by
           simp [h₆] at h₅ ⊢
           <;> aesop
         exact h₈
       simp_all [List.head!, List.append_eq_nil]
       <;> aesop
     have h₄ : ys ≠ [] := by
       by_contra h₅
       have h₆ : ys = [] := by simpa using h₅
       simp_all [List.head!, List.append_eq_nil]
       <;> aesop
     have h₅ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
       have h₆ : ∀ y ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ y := by
         intro y hy
         have h₇ : ys.head! ≤ y := by
           have h₈ : ∀ z ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ z := by
             intro z hz
             have h₉ : ys.head! ≤ z := by
               have h₁₀ : ys.head! ≤ z := by
                 have h₁₁ : ys.head! ∈ ys := by
                   apply List.head!_mem
                 have h₁₂ : ys.head! ≤ z := by
                   have h₁₃ : ys.head! ∈ ys := by
                     apply List.head!_mem
                   have h₁₄ : z ∈ ys := hz
                   have h₁₅ : ys.head! ≤ z := by
                     have h₁₆ : List.Mem (ys.head!) ys := List.head!_mem ys
                     have h₁₇ : List.Mem z ys := hz
                     cases' List.mem_iff_get.mp h₁₆ with i hi
                     cases' List.mem_iff_get.mp h₁₇ with j hj
                     have h₁₈ : i < ys.length := by
                       have h₁₉ : i < ys.length := by
                         simp_all [List.length]
                         <;> omega
                       exact h₁₉
                     have h₁₉ : j < ys.length := by
                       have h₂₀ : j < ys.length := by
                         simp_all [List.length]
                         <;> omega
                       exact h₂₀
                     have h₂₀ : ys.get ⟨i, h₁₈⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, h₁₉⟩ := by
                       have h₂₁ : i ≤ j ∨ j ≤ i := by omega
                       cases' h₂₁ with h₂₁ h₂₁
                       · -- Case: i ≤ j
                         have h₂₂ : ys.get ⟨i, h₁₈⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, h₁₉⟩ := by
                           have h₂₃ : i ≤ j := h₂₁
                           have h₂₄ : ys.get ⟨i, h₁₈⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, h₁₉⟩ := by
                             have h₂₅ : ∀ (k l : ℕ), k < l → l < ys.length → ys.get ⟨k, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨l, by omega⟩ := by
                               intro k l hkl hll
                               have h₂₆ : k < l := hkl
                               have h₂₇ : l < ys.length := hll
                               have h₂₈ : ys.get ⟨k, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨l, by omega⟩ := by
                                 -- Since the list is sorted, any element at position k is less than or equal to the element at position l if k ≤ l
                                 have h₂₉ : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < j → j < ys.length → ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                   intro i j hij hjl
                                   -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                   have h₃₀ : i < j := hij
                                   have h₃₁ : j < ys.length := hjl
                                   have h₃₂ : ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                     -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                     have h₃₃ : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < j → j < ys.length → ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                       intro i j hij hjl
                                       -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                       induction' ys with y ys ih
                                       · simp_all [List.length]
                                       · cases' j with j
                                         · simp_all [List.get]
                                         · cases' i with i
                                           · simp_all [List.get]
                                             <;> aesop
                                           · simp_all [List.get]
                                             <;>
                                               (try omega) <;>
                                               (try
                                                 {
                                                   have h₃₄ := ih
                                                   simp_all [List.get]
                                                   <;> aesop
                                                 }) <;>
                                               (try
                                                 {
                                                   simp_all [List.get]
                                                   <;> omega
                                                 })
                                     exact h₃₃ i j h₃₀ h₃₁
                                   exact h₃₂
                                 exact h₂₉ k l h₂₆ h₂₇
                               exact h₂₈
                             exact h₂₅ i j (by omega) (by omega)
                           exact h₂₄
                         exact h₂₂
                       · -- Case: j ≤ i
                         have h₂₂ : ys.get ⟨j, h₁₉⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨i, h₁₈⟩ := by
                           have h₂₃ : j ≤ i := h₂₁
                           have h₂₄ : ys.get ⟨j, h₁₉⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨i, h₁₈⟩ := by
                             have h₂₅ : ∀ (k l : ℕ), k < l → l < ys.length → ys.get ⟨k, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨l, by omega⟩ := by
                               intro k l hkl hll
                               have h₂₆ : k < l := hkl
                               have h₂₇ : l < ys.length := hll
                               have h₂₈ : ys.get ⟨k, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨l, by omega⟩ := by
                                 -- Since the list is sorted, any element at position k is less than or equal to the element at position l if k ≤ l
                                 have h₂₉ : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < j → j < ys.length → ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                   intro i j hij hjl
                                   -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                   have h₃₀ : i < j := hij
                                   have h₃₁ : j < ys.length := hjl
                                   have h₃₂ : ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                     -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                     have h₃₃ : ∀ (i j : ℕ), i < j → j < ys.length → ys.get ⟨i, by omega⟩ ≤ ys.get ⟨j, by omega⟩ := by
                                       intro i j hij hjl
                                       -- Use the fact that the list is sorted
                                       induction' ys with y ys ih
                                       · simp_all [List.length]
                                       · cases' j with j
                                         · simp_all [List.get]
                                         · cases' i with i
                                           · simp_all [List.get]
                                             <;> aesop
                                           · simp_all [List.get]
                                             <;>
                                               (try omega) <;>
                                               (try
                                                 {
                                                   have h₃₄ := ih
                                                   simp_all [List.get]
                                                   <;> aesop
                                                 }) <;>
                                               (try
                                                 {
                                                   simp_all [List.get]
                                                   <;> omega
                                                 })
                                     exact h₃₃ i j h₃₀ h₃₁
                                   exact h₃₂
                                 exact h₂₉ k l h₂₆ h₂₇
                               exact h₂₈
                             exact h₂₅ j i (by omega) (by omega)
                           exact h₂₄
                         omega
                     simp_all [List.get]
                     <;> aesop
                   exact h₁₅
                 exact h₁₂
               exact h₁₀
             exact h₉
           exact h₈ z hz
         exact h₇
       exact h₆ x hx
     exact h₅
   exact h₂

have h₁ : ∀ x ∈ ys, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h
   have h₂ : ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x := by
     intro x hx
     have h₃ : x ∈ ys := hx
     have h₄ : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h₁ x h₃
     have h₅ : (xs ++ ys).head! = xs.head! ∨ xs = [] := by
       by_cases h₆ : xs = []
       · exact Or.inr h₆
       · exact Or.inl (by
           have h₇ : (xs ++ ys).head! = xs.head! := by
             simp [h₆, List.head!, List.cons_append]
           exact h₇)
     cases h₅ with
     | inl h₅ =>
       have h₆ : xs.head! ≤ x := by
         simpa [h₅] using h₄
       have h₇ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
         have h₈ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
           by_cases h₉ : ys = []
           · simp_all [List.head!]
           · have h₁₀ : ys.head! = ys.head! := rfl
             have h₁₁ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
               by_cases h₁₂ : x ∈ ys
               · have h₁₃ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
                   have h₁₄ : ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x := by
                     intro x hx
                     have h₁₅ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
                       have h₁₆ : ys ≠ [] := by
                         intro h₁₇
                         simp_all [List.head!]
                       have h₁₈ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
                         exact List.head!_le_of_mem h₁₆ hx
                       exact h₁₈
                     exact h₁₅
                   exact h₁₄ x h₁₂
                 exact h₁₃
               · simp_all [List.head!]
             exact h₁₁
         exact h₈
       exact h₇
     | inr h₅ =>
       have h₆ : xs = [] := h₅
       have h₇ : (xs ++ ys).head! = ys.head! := by
         simp [h₆, List.head!]
         <;>
         (try cases ys <;> simp_all [List.head!, List.cons_append]) <;>
         (try simp_all [List.head!]) <;>
         (try simp_all [List.cons_append])
       have h₈ : (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x := h₄
       have h₉ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
         simp_all
       exact h₉
   exact h₂

simp [h₅] at h₃ ⊢
        <;> simp_all [List.head!]
        <;> try cases x <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
      · have h₆ : (xs ++ ys).head! = xs.head! := by
          simp [List.head!, h₅]
        have h₇ : xs.head! ≤ x := by
          simp_all [List.head!]
        have h₈ : ys.head! ≤ x := by
          have h₉ : ys ≠ [] := by
            by_contra h₉
            simp_all [List.head!, List.append_eq_nil, List.mem_cons, List.mem_nil_iff]
          simp_all [List.head!]
          <;>
          (try contradiction) <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try {
            cases x <;> simp_all (config := {decide := true})
          }) <;>
          (try {
            simp_all [List.head!, List.append, List.mem_cons, List.mem_nil_iff]
            <;> try omega
          })
        exact h₈
    exact h₄
  tauto
